blinds.title: Blinds Control

internet.name: Internet
internet.short: A dedicated, secure mesh network connects every device in the building.
internet.example: Tenants roam from lobby to rooftop without ever dropping a video call.

lighting.name: Lighting
lighting.short: Control every light in the building remotely. Create schedules, automate scenes and reduce energy consumption.
lighting.example: At 7pm the lobby dims and the workspace lights warm — automatically.

climate.name: Climate
climate.short: Smart HVAC keeps every room at the perfect temperature and air quality.
climate.example: Conference rooms cool down 10 minutes before a meeting begins.

cameras.name: Security Cameras
cameras.short: AI-powered cameras watch every entry point and recognise events in real time.
cameras.example: An unknown person at the side door triggers an instant alert to security.

access.name: Access Control
access.short: Biometric, mobile and PIN access on every door — fully audited.
access.example: Cleaners get access between 6am–9am only, no keys required.

leak.name: Leak Detection
leak.short: Sensors near plumbing instantly catch leaks before they cause damage.
leak.example: A burst pipe under the sink shuts itself off in under 4 seconds.

integrations.name: Integrations
integrations.short: Every system speaks the same language — lighting, climate, security and access connect into one platform.
integrations.example: Tapping ‘leave home’ arms cameras, locks doors and turns off lights.

parking.name: Parking Management
parking.short: License-plate driven access and live spot availability.
parking.example: A visitor’s plate is recognised and the gate opens to their reserved spot.

smartLocks.name: Smart Locks
smartLocks.short: Keyless entry on every door — mobile, biometric or temporary codes.
smartLocks.example: Send a one-time code to a delivery courier that expires in 10 minutes.

garage.name: Garage Access
garage.short: License-plate recognition opens the garage automatically as you approach.
garage.example: The garage opens 5 metres before you reach it — no remote needed.

aiConcierge.name: AI Concierge
aiConcierge.short: Multilingual AI assistant that answers guest questions, gives recommendations, and handles requests 24/7.
aiConcierge.example: A late-arriving guest asks for a nearby restaurant in Japanese — and gets a 90-second answer.

keylessCheckin.name: Keyless Check-In
keylessCheckin.short: Guests check in using mobile credentials without waiting at reception.
keylessCheckin.example: A guest walks straight from the taxi to their suite — phone in hand, no key card.

personalizedService.name: Personalized Service
personalizedService.short: The platform remembers guest preferences — lighting, temperature, and room settings.
personalizedService.example: Returning guests find their preferred temperature, lighting and curtain position already set.

roomAutomation.name: Room Automation
roomAutomation.short: Rooms automatically adjust lighting, temperature, and devices based on occupancy or preferences.
roomAutomation.example: When a guest leaves the room, lights dim, curtains close, and the AC steps down by 2°C.

hotelTemperature.name: Temperature Control
hotelTemperature.short: Automatically maintains ideal room temperature while reducing energy consumption.
hotelTemperature.example: Empty floors quietly drop a few degrees overnight — and warm back up before sunrise.

hotelLighting.name: Smart Lighting
hotelLighting.short: Warm, layered lighting across exterior, lobby, rooms and gardens — fully automated.
hotelLighting.example: At dusk the gardens, lobby and façade glow into life — all on one scene.

energyManagement.name: Energy Management
energyManagement.short: Optimise HVAC, lighting and utilities automatically to reduce operating costs.
energyManagement.example: A leaking chiller is flagged the moment its energy draw drifts outside normal range.

housekeeping.name: Housekeeping Notifications
housekeeping.short: Automatically notify housekeeping when rooms become available for service.
housekeeping.example: The moment a guest checks out, housekeeping gets the room added to their route.

analytics.name: Analytics & Insights
analytics.short: Real-time analytics for occupancy, energy, security and building performance.
analytics.example: Facility managers see which floors are underused this week — and re-plan in minutes.

tempAccess.name: Temporary Access Passes
tempAccess.short: Issue secure visitor credentials instantly — from a single screen.
tempAccess.example: A contractor receives a 4-hour QR pass that unlocks only the floors they need.

officeLighting.name: Smart Lighting
officeLighting.short: Automated lighting based on occupancy and schedules across the entire workspace.
officeLighting.example: Empty meeting rooms dim automatically — corridors stay softly lit for walk-throughs.

accessManagement.name: Access Management
accessManagement.short: Control employee and visitor access from one unified platform.
accessManagement.example: A departing employee's badge stops working on every door the moment HR confirms exit.

officeTemperature.name: Temperature Control
officeTemperature.short: Maintain comfortable indoor conditions while minimising energy use.
officeTemperature.example: Conference rooms cool down ten minutes before the calendar says a meeting begins.

occupancy.name: Occupancy Monitoring
occupancy.short: Monitor workspace usage to optimise layouts and improve efficiency.
occupancy.example: Two underused desk pods are merged into a quiet zone — based on a month of data.

energyOptimization.name: Energy Optimization
energyOptimization.short: AI automatically optimises energy usage across all building systems.
energyOptimization.example: On a sunny afternoon, lights dim and the AC tunes back — without anyone lifting a finger.

meetingRooms.name: Meeting Room Booking
meetingRooms.short: Employees reserve meeting rooms instantly with automatic scheduling.

connected.title: Instant interaction. Full management.
connected.subtitle: Talesso meets your team where they already work — phone, chat, or browser.

mobile.title: Mobile App
mobile.desc: Full control in your pocket — iOS & Android.

telegram.title: Telegram Bot
telegram.desc: Quick commands and alerts in chat.

dashboard.title: Web Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Manage buildings, users and analytics from any browser.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Real humans, anytime — alongside the AI.

readyCta.subtitle1: Fell free to as questions and reach our Team
readyCta.subtitle2: for discussing all the details of your project

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.p1: Founded as a small company specializing in biometric access systems, we have grown into a comprehensive technology ecosystem encompassing access control, intelligent management platforms, AI-driven solutions, automation, and smart environments.
aboutPage.p2: Based in the heart of the Mediterranean, Cyprus, we design and develop our own products with a clear mission: to create technology that makes everyday life simpler, safer, and more connected.
aboutPage.p3: We believe that our environment affects our emotions, thoughts and desires. So we decided to design and develop technology that transforms the way people interact with their spaces.
aboutPage.p4: By seamlessly integrating technology into homes, workplaces, and commercial environments, we create intelligent spaces that work for people.
aboutPage.p5: At the core of everything we build is a commitment to improving the way people experience their environment —
aboutPage.p6: one smart solution at a time.

clientsPage.headline:
Deployed & trusted
every day.
clientsPage.description: Talesso is trusted every day by businesses, residential communities and commercial properties. Our software integrates seamlessly with existing access control systems and scales with your infrastructure without replacing your current hardware.

contactPage.title1: Fill out the form and we'll get
contactPage.subtitle: We're here to answer your questions and provide the support you need.

videoPage.subtitle: A high-performance biometric system that turns every entrance into an intelligent checkpoint.

liveness.d: Blocks photo, video and mask spoofing attempts in real time.

match.d: Identifies authorized people in under 300 ms at the door.

edge.d: Privacy-first inference at the edge, dashboards in the cloud.
